steps.title: Set up the equation from the given information
steps.content:
The city's total budget is broken down into two parts: departmental expenses ($y$ million dollars) and other expenses (201 million dollars). Since these parts must add up to the total:

$$x = y + 201$$

steps.title: Rearrange to match the answer choices
steps.content:
Subtract $y$ from both sides of the equation:

$$x - y = 201$$

That matches choice B — B is correct.
